entries.concept_hook: A calculating poison master who seduces information from targets before eliminating them with undetectable toxins
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Poison Ivy from Batman meets Brazilian crime drama queenpin
entries.face_adornment: viper mask with glowing green eyes

entries.concept_hook: An enigmatic oracle who sees combat outcomes before they happen, using ancient divination to predict and counter every strike
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Raven from Teen Titans meets Eastern European folklore witch
entries.face_adornment: crescent moon tiara with small gemstones
